notes: SHIP v1.14.260 — RACK STRUCTURE: sparse racks read as racks (per HANDOFF-INSPECT3D-RACK-STRUCTURE.md, committed to /mocks/). ⚠️ THIS IS NEW GEOMETRY, NOT A PORT — the mock has NO perforation and NO per-U rail detail; John-approved 2026-07-15, recorded so no future session 'corrects' it back out. WHY: John compared the app to the mock and it looked like a glass display case. Root cause (OODA-proven, NOT a render defect): the mock renders a GB300 NVL72 (46U of declared hardware); the app was rendering s1:001 / US-SPK03, a SPINE rack — MASTER-US-WEST-10A-US-SPK03-SPARKS holds s1:*/s3:* spine racks ONLY, NO compute cabinets — s1:001 is 48U holding 8 devices. It looks empty because it IS empty; no renderer change puts 38 devices into a rack the Master says has 8. But a real 48U spine rack with 8 switches STILL looks like a rack because ~40U of mounting rail + square-hole perforation are physically there, and PHANTOM drew none of it. This ship draws it. DOCTRINE (John-ruled, verbatim): 'RAILS ARE THE RACK. BLANKS ARE HARDWARE.' The Master states 48U → 48U of rail/perforation/U-position exist → drawing them declares NOTHING the Master didn't (permitted). The Master does NOT say 'blank at U15' → painting a blanking panel there would CLAIM a U is filled (tells a Day-0 tech to pull a panel that isn't there) = BLANK over a U the Master never described = the same family as BLANK over real gear (.246-.251 arc, Unified Law) = FORBIDDEN. Empty U renders as rails + perforation + the existing back panel, NEVER a panel face. THREE EDITS, dct-ios.html only, all inside rackElevation_render3D. EDIT A — PERFORATED MOUNTING RAILS (the core; canvas texture, NOT geometry — 48×3×4=576 hole meshes would kill an iPhone): the two ported 0.08-wide front verticals (L31862) are REPLACED by four rails — geometry widened to BoxGeometry(0.17, RH-0.5, 0.09) (~22mm face, reads correct without cartooning), x/z positions kept EXACTLY, body stays CHROME (steelMat). Two matching REAR rails added at z=-(RD/2-0.24) (real racks have four; the rear pair sells depth through an empty rack from ISO — one-entry delete if John rules front-only). Perforation = ONE shared CanvasTexture (32×64 = one U tile: chrome-black body 0x0c0f14, 3 EIA-310 square holes per U at cy 12/32/52 with a machined lip stroke rgba(160,190,215,0.30) + a 1px edge highlight), wrapS/wrapT Repeat, repeat.set(1, totalU), magFilter Linear, pushed to _bayTex (CanvasTextures leak GPU mem on repeat opens if not disposed). Applied as a SECOND material on the rail's FRONT FACE ONLY via a 6-slot material array (BoxGeometry index 4 = +Z for front rails, 5 = -Z for rear); all other faces stay CHROME. railFaceMat = MeshStandardMaterial({ map, color 0xffffff, metal .88, rough .34, env .25 }). repeat.y = totalU is LOAD-BEARING — the hole pitch must land on real U boundaries or a tech miscounts; if totalU is falsy the rails FALL BACK to plain CHROME (fail honest, never a wrong pitch). EDIT B — U-POSITION TICKS: every 5U (U5..U<totalU) on the inner face of both front rails, a PlaneGeometry(0.05, 0.012) MeshBasicMaterial 0x7d93a4 opacity 0.5 at yFor(u), x = s*(RW/2-0.22) (inner edge), z just proud of the front-rail face. Honest (totalU is stated fact); ticks ONLY, no numerals (the MINI/U-MAP strip carries numbers; text meshes cost + fight legibility at this scale). First to go if FPS moves. EDIT C — MASTER-DECLARED BLANKS RENDER AS HARDWARE: the blank branch now uses the mock ghost recipe VERBATIM (L474-478: 0x0a0f14 · metal .4 · rough .85 · opacity .4 · env .25 · no strip [gated] · no interior). ⚠️ NOTE (honest): this branch is UNREACHED on every current Master — the 3D rack types via master_hostType→_TMAP, and master_hostType has no 'blank' output (deploy_classifyDevice's 'blank' is the EDP/CSV path, not this one), so disp is never 'blank'. So EDIT C is FORWARD-CORRECT ONLY; it fires for no current data. That is the SAFE outcome and it upholds the doctrine automatically: an UNDECLARED U has no slot → no mesh → it renders as rails + perforation + back panel and NEVER a panel face. No classifier rule was invented to synthesize blanks (no evidence; the handoff confirms this Master declares none; that would be the .238 guess the honesty arc kills). MESH DELTA: +2 rail meshes (4 rails replace 2 verticals) + 18 tick planes (9 U-marks × 2 rails on a 48U rack) + 1 CanvasTexture; the 2 removed front-vertical edge-lines net it to ~+18 objects — negligible. Gates: node --check 4 inline blocks + sw.js PASS; CSS brace balance 3858/3858 (UNCHANGED — no CSS this ship; the rails/ticks are geometry; verified the diff touches zero <style> content); CRLF preserved (bare-LF 0); railTex in _bayTex dispose registry; three-stamp lockstep .259->.260. ?legacy=1 BYTE-IDENTICAL: all edits inside rackElevation_render3D, reachable only via the body.rd 3D toggle; the legacy house never enters it. Applies ONLY to the reh3d bay scene; forge3d untouched. CLOSING NOTE (handoff, for the record): this ENDS the mock-fidelity arc. The renderer now matches the mock; the remaining difference between John's two screenshots is WHICH MASTER IS LOADED — a GB300/HGX Master will render like the mock because that is the rack the mock was built from. Any future 'doesn't match the mock' report runs the mechanical parameter diff FIRST (scene/lights/materials, all deltas at once), spot-fixes second — three ships (.257/.259/.260 hunting) were spent on one-variable-at-a-time chasing that a 30-second audit catches. DEVICE-VERIFY (John, iPhone): [1] s1:001 (8 devices, 48U) now reads as a RACK — rails with square-hole perforation floor to ceiling, 8 switches mounted in it, NOT a display case (THE WHOLE POINT). [2] Hole pitch lands on U boundaries — count 3 holes/U against the MINI strip. [3] Rear rails visible through empty U at ISO — depth reads (or rule front-only, 1-entry delete). [4] U ticks every 5U, subtle, not competing with hardware. [5] NO blanking panel in any U the Master didn't declare — doctrine gate. [6] A dense rack (s3:176, 21 components) still looks right — rails don't fight hardware. [7] Bay/scan/fog/palette unchanged · tap-tray→detail · FLAT→GL disposed · FORGE after→no dual-GL crash · cold PWA reopen offline. [8] ?legacy=1 byte-identical. BATCH: 3D-rack line now .251-.257 + .259 + .260 — consolidated device pass still owed; this closes the fidelity arc. STILL OWED — JOHN'S RULING (unchanged): DFW02 empty-model row @c1:001:38 (this may be the signal that WOULD make a declared blank reachable — EDIT C is ready for it); heights for gpu-b40-02/cpu-gp2-*/inf-med-01/om2216-c14/fs-media-converter-chassis/VAST DBox/net-ufm-05; whether .252 magenta reads too loud; the FLAT-elevation EDP-vocabulary colour bug (own ship).
